# Agent Skills Index
URL_TEMPLATE: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/{repo}/main/skills/{path}/SKILL.md
COLUMNS: id;repo;path;summary

## CATEGORIES (ROUTING)
- ai-llm: ./llms/categories/ai-llm.txt (800/2026 skills)
- business: ./llms/categories/business.txt (559/559 skills)
- data: ./llms/categories/data.txt (523/523 skills)
- design: ./llms/categories/design.txt (432/432 skills)
- dev: ./llms/categories/dev.txt (800/2299 skills)
- devops: ./llms/categories/devops.txt (776/776 skills)
- other: ./llms/categories/other.txt (246/246 skills)
- pending: ./llms/categories/pending.txt (800/1986 skills)
- product: ./llms/categories/product.txt (169/169 skills)
- productivity: ./llms/categories/productivity.txt (436/436 skills)
- research: ./llms/categories/research.txt (261/261 skills)
- security: ./llms/categories/security.txt (388/388 skills)
- web: ./llms/categories/web.txt (800/1058 skills)

## TOP 500 GLOBAL SKILLS
find-skills;vercel-labs/skills;main/skills/find-skills;Helps users discover and install agent skills based on their queries.
weather;steipete/clawdis;weather;Fetches current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo without API keys. Handles location-based queries.
summarize;steipete/clawdis;summarize;Summarize or extract text/transcripts from URLs, podcasts, and local files with fallback for video transcription.
gog;steipete/clawdis;gog;Google Workspace CLI tool for managing Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs from command line.
peekaboo;steipete/clawdis;peekaboo;Capture and automate macOS UI with the Peekaboo CLI tool for UI automation tasks.
coding-agent;steipete/clawdis;coding-agent;Delegates coding tasks to AI agents (Codex, Claude, Pi) via background process for building, PR review, and refactoring. Requires bash with
clawhub;steipete/clawdis;clawhub;CLI tool for managing agent skills from clawhub.com - search, install, update, and publish skills
mcporter;steipete/clawdis;mcporter;CLI tool for managing MCP servers/tools with listing, configuration, authentication, and direct calling capabilities.
apple-reminders;steipete/clawdis;apple-reminders;Manage Apple Reminders via CLI. Supports list, add, edit, complete, delete operations with filters and JSON output.
openai-whisper;steipete/clawdis;openai-whisper;Local speech-to-text conversion using OpenAI's Whisper CLI without requiring an API key.
apple-notes;steipete/clawdis;apple-notes;Manage Apple Notes via memo CLI on macOS for creating, viewing, editing, deleting, searching, moving, and exporting notes.
tmux;steipete/clawdis;tmux;Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.
nano-pdf;steipete/clawdis;nano-pdf;Edit PDFs with natural-language instructions using the nano-pdf CLI tool for automated document processing.
healthcheck;steipete/clawdis;healthcheck;Security healthcheck for OpenClaw deployments including hardening, risk assessment, and periodic security checks.
himalaya;steipete/clawdis;himalaya;CLI tool for email management via IMAP/SMTP with multi-account support and MML composition.
session-logs;steipete/clawdis;session-logs;Search and analyze session logs using jq for conversation history management and debugging
obsidian;steipete/clawdis;obsidian;Automate Obsidian vault management with plain Markdown notes using obsidian-cli for workflow optimization.
video-frames;steipete/clawdis;video-frames;Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.
trello;steipete/clawdis;trello;Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API for project and task management automation.
model-usage;steipete/clawdis;model-usage;Summarizes per-model usage and costs from CodexBar CLI for Codex or Claude models, providing current or full model breakdowns.
notion;steipete/clawdis;notion;Notion API for creating and managing pages, databases, and blocks.
github;steipete/clawdis;github;GitHub operations via gh CLI for issues, PRs, CI, and code review. Automates dev workflows without browser UI.
blogwatcher;steipete/clawdis;blogwatcher;Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds for updates using the blogwatcher CLI tool.
sherpa-onnx-tts;steipete/clawdis;sherpa-onnx-tts;Local text-to-speech via sherpa-onnx (offline, no cloud)
spotify-player;steipete/clawdis;spotify-player;Terminal-based Spotify player for playback and search via spogo or spotify_player
wacli;steipete/clawdis;wacli;Send WhatsApp messages and sync WhatsApp history via CLI tool wacli for non-normal user chats.
openai-whisper-api;steipete/clawdis;openai-whisper-api;Transcribe audio using OpenAI's Whisper API for converting speech to text.
voice-call;steipete/clawdis;voice-call;Start voice calls via the OpenClaw voice-call plugin for AI-powered communication.
nano-banana-pro;steipete/clawdis;nano-banana-pro;Generate or edit images via Gemini 3 Pro Image (Nano Banana Pro)
sonoscli;steipete/clawdis;sonoscli;Control Sonos speakers via CLI for discovery, status, play, volume, and grouping.
gifgrep;steipete/clawdis;gifgrep;Search GIF providers with CLI/TUI, download results, and extract stills/sheets.
goplaces;steipete/clawdis;goplaces;Query Google Places API via goplaces CLI for text search, place details, reviews with human-friendly or JSON output.
sag;steipete/clawdis;sag;ElevenLabs text-to-speech with mac-style say UX.
openai-image-gen;steipete/clawdis;openai-image-gen;Batch-generate images via OpenAI Images API with random prompt sampling and HTML gallery output.

imsg;steipete/clawdis;imsg;CLI tool for iMessage/SMS to list chats, view history, and send messages via Messages.app.
oracle;steipete/clawdis;oracle;Best practices for using the oracle CLI with prompt/file bundling, engines, sessions, and file attachment patterns.

bear-notes;steipete/clawdis;bear-notes;Create, search, and manage Bear notes via grizzly CLI for efficient note management.
openhue;steipete/clawdis;openhue;Control Philips Hue lights and scenes via the OpenHue CLI.
camsnap;steipete/clawdis;camsnap;Capture frames or clips from RTSP/ONVIF cameras.
ordercli;steipete/clawdis;ordercli;Command-line tool for checking Foodora order history and status. Deliveroo integration is work in progress.
eightctl;steipete/clawdis;eightctl;Control Eight Sleep pods (status, temperature, alarms, schedules).
gemini;steipete/clawdis;gemini;Gemini CLI for one-shot Q&A, summaries, and generation.
blucli;steipete/clawdis;blucli;BluOS CLI tool for audio system discovery, playback, grouping, and volume control
skill-creator;steipete/clawdis;skill-creator;Create or update AgentSkills for designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
songsee;steipete/clawdis;songsee;Generate spectrograms and feature-panel visualizations from audio with the songsee CLI tool.
discord;steipete/clawdis;discord;Discord ops via the message tool (channel=discord).
xurl;steipete/clawdis;xurl;A CLI tool for making authenticated requests to the X (Twitter) API. Use this skill when you need to post tweets, reply, quote, search, read posts, manage followers, send DMs, upload media, or interact with any X API v2 endpoint.
gh-issues;steipete/clawdis;gh-issues;Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address PR review comments. Usage: /gh-issues [owner/repo] [--label bug] [--limit 5] [--milestone v1.0] [--assignee @me] [--fork user/repo] [--watch] [--interval 5] [--reviews-only] [--cron] [--dry-run] [--model glm-5] [--notify-channel -1002381931352]
local-places;steipete/clawdis;;A skill for handling local places and location-based services
fix;facebook/react;fix;Fix lint errors and formatting issues before committing code.
extract-errors;facebook/react;extract-errors;Extract and handle error messages in React applications.
verify;facebook/react;verify;A skill for validating changes before committing or checking React contribution requirements.
test;facebook/react;test;A skill for running tests on React core with support for multiple channels.
feature-flags;facebook/react;feature-flags;A skill for handling feature flag issues, debugging, and adding new flags in React applications.
flow;facebook/react;flow;A skill for running Flow type checking and handling Flow type errors in React code.
flags;facebook/react;flags;Check feature flag states, compare channels, and debug cross-release behavior.
accessibility;microsoft/vscode;accessibility;Accessibility guidelines for VS Code features — covers accessibility help dialogs, accessible views, verbosity settings, accessibility signals, ARIA alerts/status announcements, keyboard navigation, and ARIA labels/roles. Applies to both new interactive UI surfaces and updates to existing features. Use when creating new UI or updating existing UI features.
fix-errors;microsoft/vscode;fix-errors;Guidelines for fixing unhandled errors from the VS Code error telemetry dashboard. Use when investigating error-telemetry issues with stack traces, error messages, and hit/user counts. Covers tracing data flow through call stacks, identifying producers of invalid data vs. consumers that crash, enriching error messages for telemetry diagnosis, and avoiding common anti-patterns like silently swallowing errors.
sessions;microsoft/vscode;sessions;Agent Sessions window architecture — covers the sessions-first app, layering, folder structure, chat widget, menus, contributions, entry points, and development guidelines. Use when implementing features or fixing issues in the Agent Sessions window.
agent-sessions-layout;microsoft/vscode;agent-sessions-layout;Agent Sessions workbench layout — covers the fixed layout structure, grid configuration, part visibility, editor modal, titlebar, sidebar footer, and implementation requirements. Use when implementing features or fixing issues in the Agent Sessions workbench layout.
author-contributions;microsoft/vscode;author-contributions;Identify all files a specific author contributed to on a branch vs its upstream, tracing code through renames. Use when asked who edited what, what code an author contributed, or to audit authorship before a merge. This skill should be run as a subagent — it performs many git operations and returns a concise table.
hygiene;microsoft/vscode;hygiene;Use when making code changes to ensure they pass VS Code's hygiene checks. Covers the pre-commit hook, unicode restrictions, string quoting rules, copyright headers, indentation, formatting, ESLint, and stylelint. Run the hygiene check before declaring work complete.
azure-pipelines;microsoft/vscode;azure-pipelines;Use when validating Azure DevOps pipeline changes for the VS Code build. Covers queueing builds, checking build status, viewing logs, and iterating on pipeline YAML changes without waiting for full CI runs.
tool-rename-deprecation;microsoft/vscode;tool-rename-deprecation;Ensure renamed built-in tool references preserve backward compatibility. Use when renaming a toolReferenceName, tool set referenceName, or any tool identifier. Run on ANY change to tool registration code. Covers legacyToolReferenceFullNames for tools and legacyFullNames for tool sets.
create-pr;n8n-io/n8n;create-pr;Automatically creates properly formatted GitHub pull requests for code reviews.
content-design;n8n-io/n8n;content-design;Product content designer for UI copy. Use when writing, reviewing, or auditing user-facing text: button labels, error messages, tooltips, empty states, modal copy, placeholder text, confirmation dialogs, onboarding flows, or i18n strings. Also use when the user says /copy, /content, or /ux-copy.
n8n-conventions;n8n-io/n8n;n8n-conventions;Quick reference for n8n patterns and conventions with full documentation.
linear-issue;n8n-io/n8n;linear-issue;Fetch and analyze Linear issue with all related context. Use when starting work on a Linear ticket, analyzing issues, or gathering context about a Linear issue.
loom-transcript;n8n-io/n8n;loom-transcript;Fetch and display the full transcript from a Loom video URL. Use when the user wants to get or read a Loom transcript.

update-docs;vercel/next.js;update-docs;A skill for updating Next.js documentation based on code changes, guiding users through a structured workflow.
authoring-skills;vercel/next.js;authoring-skills;How to create and maintain agent skills in .agents/skills/. Use when creating a new SKILL.md, writing skill descriptions, choosing frontmatter fields, or deciding what content belongs in a skill vs AGENTS.md. Covers the supported spec fields, description writing, naming conventions, and the relationship between always-loaded AGENTS.md and on-demand skills.
runtime-debug;vercel/next.js;runtime-debug;Debug and verification workflow for runtime-bundle and module-resolution regressions. Use when diagnosing unexpected module inclusions, bundle size regressions, or CI failures related to NEXT_SKIP_ISOLATE, nft.json traces, or runtime bundle selection (module.compiled.js). Covers CI env mirroring, full stack traces via __NEXT_SHOW_IGNORE_LISTED, route trace inspection, and webpack stats diffing.
react-vendoring;vercel/next.js;react-vendoring;React vendoring and react-server layer boundaries. Use when editing entry-base.ts, $$compiled.internal.d.ts, compiled/react* packages, or taskfile.js copy_vendor_react. Covers the entry-base.ts boundary (all react-server-dom-webpack/* imports must go through it), vendored React channels, type declarations, Turbopack remap to react-server-dom-turbopack, ComponentMod access patterns, and ESLint suppression for guarded requires.
flags;vercel/next.js;flags;How to add or modify Next.js experimental feature flags end-to-end. Use when editing config-shared.ts, config-schema.ts, define-env-plugin.ts, next-server.ts, export/worker.ts, or module.compiled.js. Covers type declaration, zod schema, build-time injection, runtime env plumbing, and the decision between runtime env-var branching vs separate bundle variants.
dce-edge;vercel/next.js;dce-edge;DCE-safe require() patterns and edge runtime constraints. Use when writing conditional require() calls, guarding Node-only imports (node:stream etc.), or editing define-env-plugin.ts / app-render / stream-utils for edge builds. Covers if/else branching for webpack DCE, TypeScript definite assignment, the NEXT_RUNTIME vs real feature flag distinction, and forcing flags false for edge in define-env.ts.
pr-status-triage;vercel/next.js;pr-status-triage;Triage CI failures and PR review comments using scripts/pr-status.js. Use when investigating failing CI jobs, flaky tests, or PR review feedback. Covers blocker-first prioritization (build > lint > types > tests), CI env var matching for local reproduction, and the Known Flaky Tests distinction.
next-cache-components;vercel/next.js;;A Next.js component for efficient caching.
